channel.title: Frontion News - Tier 1 Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Rushed Off Stage After Armed Man Opens Fire at White House Correspondents Dinner
item.description: An armed gunman stormed the Washington Hilton lobby as President Trump was beginning his speech at the annual White House Correspondents Association Dinner. Secret Service agents shot the suspect, who was armed with multiple guns and knives. One officer was hit but protected by a bulletproof vest.

item.title: 🇲🇱 Major Coordinated Attack Hits Multiple Cities Across Mali
item.description: Jihadist group JNIM and separatist Azawad Liberation Front launched simultaneous attacks on Bamako, Kati, Gao, Kidal, and other cities in what analysts call the largest coordinated jihadist attack in Mali in years. Gunmen attacked the airport area and a military helicopter was reportedly shot down near Gao.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin Approval Ratings Drop as Russian Influencers Voice Growing Discontent
item.description: A viral 19-minute video by a Russian blogger with 31 million views has sparked a wave of public criticism over internet restrictions and the strained wartime economy. Putin's approval fell to 65.6% in state polls, the lowest since before the Ukraine war began, amid growing frustration with the conflict's fifth year.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Seven Killed as Russia Launches Massive Overnight Strike on Ukraine
item.description: Russian missiles and drones killed at least seven people across Ukraine overnight, including five in Dnipro where an apartment building was hit. Ukraine reported repelling most of over 600 drones in one of the largest attacks in days. Romania investigated an object falling on its territory near the Ukrainian border.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Orders Vigorous Attack on Hezbollah After Ceasefire Extension
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu directed the military to "vigorously attack" Hezbollah targets in Lebanon, just two days after a ceasefire was extended. At least six people were killed in Israeli strikes on Saturday, with cross-border exchanges straining the truce agreement.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombia Highway Bombing Kills 14 Ahead of Presidential Election
item.description: A bomb attack on the Pan-American Highway in Cauca department killed 14 and injured 38, including five minors. Authorities blamed FARC dissidents led by Ivan Mordisco, the country's most-wanted criminal, as political violence escalates before the May 31 vote.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japanese Destroyer Transits Taiwan Strait in First Major Passage Under Takaichi
item.description: The JS Ikazuchi, a Murasame-class destroyer, conducted a deliberate 14-hour transit through the Taiwan Strait, sparking outrage in Beijing. The move signals a significant shift in Japan's regional security stance under Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Refinery and Chemical Plant in Deep-Raids
item.description: Ukrainian long-range drones hit the Slavneft-YANOS refinery in Yaroslavl and a chemical complex in Volgograd, continuing Kyiv's campaign to degrade Russian industrial infrastructure. Five workers were hospitalized with chemical burns at the Apatit nitrogen complex.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Macron Warns Europe Must Wake Up as US, Russia, and China Align Against It
item.description: Speaking in Athens, the French president called for European strategic autonomy, saying Washington, Moscow, and Beijing are now categorically opposed to European interests. The remarks come as Germany unveils its first comprehensive defense strategy since WWII.

item.title: 🇪🇸 Spain Rejects NATO Suspension Threat, Says It Is Reliable Member
item.description: Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez defended Spain's NATO credentials after reports the Pentagon considered suspending allies refusing to support Iran operations. Italy and France also refused overflight rights for US military aircraft deployed for the Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇰🇵 Russian Duma Speaker Visits Pyongyang for North Korea War Memorial Opening
item.description: Vyacheslav Volodin arrived in North Korea to attend the opening of a memorial honoring North Korean soldiers killed fighting for Russia in Ukraine. The visit underscores deepening military ties between Moscow and Pyongyang following North Korea's troop deployment.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇫🇷 Macron Affirms EU Defense Clause Stronger Than NATO's Article 5
item.description: The French president said during a visit to Greece that the EU's mutual defense clause (Article 42.7) is 'stronger' than NATO's collective defense provision, citing military aid sent to Cyprus after a drone attack. The statement comes amid uncertainty over US commitment to NATO.

item.title: ☢️🇺🇦 Ukrainians Mark Chernobyl Anniversary Amid War Fears
item.description: Residents of Slavutych gathered for a midnight vigil commemorating the 40th anniversary of the Chernobyl nuclear disaster, defying wartime curfews. The anniversary comes as Ukraine worries Russia's war could trigger another nuclear catastrophe.

item.title: 💥🇺🇦 Russian Strikes on Dnipro Kill Five, Wound Dozens
item.description: Russian drone and missile strikes on the Ukrainian city of Dnipro killed at least five people and wounded 46, authorities said. The attacks caused fires across the city and partially destroyed several apartment buildings.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Gunman opens fire at White House Correspondents Dinner, Trump evacuated safely
item.description: A shooter fired shots at the Washington Hilton during the White House Correspondents Association dinner, forcing President Trump and top officials to be evacuated. One officer was shot but saved by a bulletproof vest; the suspect is in custody.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US-Iran peace talks collapse as Trump cancels envoy visit to Pakistan
item.description: Diplomatic efforts stalled after Trump called off Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner trip to Islamabad, saying Iran offered a lot but not enough. Both sides show little willingness to soften terms as the war enters its third month.

item.title: 🇹🇳 Tunisia suspends one of Africas oldest human rights groups in widening crackdown
item.description: Authorities ordered a one-month suspension of the Tunisian League for Human Rights, part of the Nobel Peace Prize-winning National Dialogue Quartet. The move signals deepening authoritarianism in the North African nation.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇲🇲 Chinas top diplomat meets Myanmar junta leader on regional tour
item.description: Chinas Foreign Minister visited Naypyidaw and met with the military-backed government leader, deepening Beijings regional ties as Myanmars civil war continues. The visit underscores Chinas growing influence in Southeast Asia.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇫🇷 Macron says EU mutual defense clause is stronger than NATO amid US commitment doubts
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron declared the EUs Article 42.7 mutual defense clause stronger than NATO, as European leaders debate building independent defense capabilities. The statement reflects growing anxiety about Washingtons reliability.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Orders IDF Strikes on Hezbollah After Ceasefire Violations
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu ordered the IDF to "vigorously" attack Hezbollah in southern Lebanon after the group launched projectiles into northern Israel. The ceasefire extension announced by Trump appears increasingly fragile as both sides exchange fire.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary's Orban Refuses Parliament Seat After Historic Election Defeat
item.description: Viktor Orban, Hungary's dominant political figure for 36 years, said he will not take up his parliament seat following his party's landslide defeat. He plans to lead Fidesz through a "renewal" process, with analysts seeing his loss as evidence that right-wing populism may be peaking.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Kills Four in Southern Lebanon Despite Ceasefire Extension
item.description: Israeli strikes killed at least four people in southern Lebanon's Nabatieh district, as Israel continues attacks despite a three-week ceasefire extension. Hezbollah lawmakers say the ceasefire is "meaningless" given Israel's ongoing hostilities.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India Signs $1.2 Billion Deal for Russian Long-Range Air-to-Air Missiles
item.description: India has reportedly signed a deal for 300 Russian R-37M ultra-long-range missiles designed to target support aircraft like airborne early-warning and tanker planes. The move comes as Pakistan and China continue integrating their aerial weapons systems.

item.title: ☢️ UN Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty Review Opens Amid Global War Tensions
item.description: Signatories to the landmark NPT meet at the UN as arms control agreements between major powers have collapsed and nuclear capabilities expand. The nine nuclear-armed states now possess over 12,000 warheads, with the US and Russia holding 90%.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Collapse as Trump Cancels Envoys Trip to Pakistan
item.description: The latest ceasefire negotiations between Washington and Tehran failed after Iran's foreign minister left Islamabad and Trump told his envoys not to travel. Trump said Iran needs to call if they want to talk, while Iran questioned how it can trust the US after its port blockade.
